welcome.title: Welcome to Metamates
welcome.description: The AI panel on the right is the main entry. Say what you want — AI reads and writes notes in the same folder.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.step1Desc: Choose a folder on the left — AI reads and writes there
gettingStarted.step2Desc: Pick an AI in the right panel and send your first message
gettingStarted.step3Desc: Open what AI wrote in the center editor; files save automatically
gettingStarted.step4Desc: Try /today or describe the task in plain language

editor.title: Editor Features
editor.realtimeRenderDesc: Markdown formats render instantly, what you see is what you get
editor.wikiLinkDesc: Type [[ to create links, click to navigate
editor.tagsDesc: Type # to add tags for categorization
editor.autoSaveDesc: Changes are saved automatically to file

features.title: More Features
features.fileTree: File Tree - Drag & drop, right-click menu
features.search: Ctrl+P command palette, Ctrl+Shift+F global search, Ctrl+Shift+P today's PLAN
features.ai: Agent execution — 15 slash commands; results write back to the vault (Act & Verify); user memory in 04_Intelligence/Memory_Index.md
features.memory: User memory — mirror summaries to 04_Intelligence/Memory_Index.md, not CLI-only caches
features.calendar: Diary calendar — click a date to open or create diary & PLAN
